_notes: Hand-curated by reading the US Core Organization differential (18 elements) line by line against the R4 Organization snapshot. Key R4 facts: identifier min=0; identifier.system/value NOT in R4 snapshot (inherited from Identifier datatype as 0..1); active min=0; name min=0; telecom min=0; address min=0; address sub-elements (line, city, state, postalCode, country) NOT in R4 Organization snapshot (inherited from Address datatype). NPI/CLIA/NAIC slices are new. Organization has no USCDI annotation extensions in its differential (uscdi=0). Note: identifier.system and .value in the diff do NOT set min=1, only max=1 (not a cardinality increase). NPI/CLIA/NAIC constraints are separate items per constraint key.

drifts.description: MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Slicing added on identifier: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. No slicing exists in R4 base.

MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain identifier sub-elements; they are inherited from the Identifier datatype as 0..1.

MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain identifier sub-elements; they are inherited from the Identifier datatype as 0..1.
New slice 'NPI' added with patternIdentifier system=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-npi and mustSupport=true. No equivalent slice exists in R4 base.
Constraint 'us-core-16' added (severity: error): NPI must be 10 digits. Expression: value.matches('^[0-9]{10}$'). Not present in R4 base.
Constraint 'us-core-17' added (severity: error): NPI check digit must be valid (Luhn algorithm check). Not present in R4 base.
New slice 'CLIA' added with patternIdentifier system=urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.4.7 (Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments number) and mustSupport=false. No equivalent slice exists in R4 base.
Constraint 'us-core-18' added (severity: error): CLIA number must be 10 digits with a letter 'D' in third position. Expression: value.matches('^[0-9]{2}D[0-9]{7}$'). Not present in R4 base.
New slice 'NAIC' added with patternIdentifier system=urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.6.300 (NAIC company code for payers) and mustSupport=false. No equivalent slice exists in R4 base.
Constraint 'us-core-19' added (severity: error): NAIC must be 5 digits. Expression: value.matches('^[0-9]{5}$'). Not present in R4 base.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Organization active status becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows an Organization without an active flag.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Organization name becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows an Organization without a name.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain telecom sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain telecom sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Cardinality max constrained: [0..*] -> [0..4]. Address lines are limited to 4 in US Core. R4 Address.line is inherited as 0..*.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
New binding added in target: extensible binding to http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-usps-state (US USPS state codes). R4 Organization does not constrain address.state with any binding.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). R4 Organization snapshot does not constrain address sub-elements.
